name: groups-fanout
description: Apply a single groups.json bundle across every host in the target group. Wraps scripts-linux/68-user-mgmt/add-group-from-json.sh on each remote.

inputs.GROUPS_JSON: Local path to groups.json bundle on the controller
inputs.USERMGMT_DIR: Path to scripts-linux/68-user-mgmt/ on each remote (default: /opt/68-user-mgmt)
